titleStmt.title: SII 22.252: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 252. (A.R. No. 252 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. ACHYUTADĒVA-MAHĀRĀYA—Śaka 1460.

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Viḷambi, Mēsha, śu. 11, Monday corresponding to A.D. 1538, April 8. The tithi was śu. 10. This records an endowment made by the king of half of the village Vanpākkam with its annual income of 40 poṉ left as poliyūṭṭu-ubayam with one Muḍumbai Veṅkappar of Īchchambāḍi for meeting the daily expenses of an offering to god Tiruppanaṅgāvuḍaiya-Nāyanār Anbuḍaiya-Nāyanār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śvasti śrīman makāmaṇṭaleśvara Irācāti Irāca Irācaparameśvara
pūṟuva tekṣaṇa paccima Uttiracamuttirātipati śrīvirappiṟatāpa
śrīvira Accutaiya tevamakārāyar piṟutivi rācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷāni
ṉṟa cakāṟttam 1000 4 100 6 10-n mel cellāniṉṟa viḷampi samvaṟcarattu meṣa
nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu Ekāteciyum somavāramum peṟṟa Iṟṟaināḷ ceya
ṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattuk kāliyūṟ koṭṭattu kaḻumalavaḷanāṭṭu piramateca
ppaṟṟu tiruppaṉaiṅkāṭu Uṭaiyār tiruppaṉaiṅkāvuṭaiya nayiṉār Aṉpuṭaiya nayiṉār tampirā
ṉāṟku Accutaiyateva mahārāyaṟku puṇṇiyamāka Īccampāṭiyil muṭumpai Aracappar putran
veṅkappar vaṉmākkam melpāti kiṟāmam Araiyum Iṉnayiṉāṟku poli yūṭṭu Upaiyamāka viṭṭa
kiṟāmam Araikku varuṣam Oṉṟukku rekai poṉ 4 10kku Iṉnayiṉāṟku Amutu
ceytaruḷa nāḷ 1- kku Amutukku �cita�ṅakku taḷikai 6- kkum paṭi veñ caṉattukkum Erikaru
mpukkum paricārakattukkum cilavu poṉṉāṟpatu Inta Āṟu taḷikai Amutum mel vecca
mum cantirātittavaraiyum naṭattakkaṭavarkaḷākavum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu nālattoṉṟu karip
piṟasātamṅacala-yum veṅkappar piḷḷaikku puttira pavuttira paramparaiyāka cantirātitta
varaiyum naṭattakkaṭaivomākavum Ippaṭikku Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇakku
teṉṉava taraiyar camaiya mutaliyār Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 22.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
